task: add a webhook handler for provider delivery events
failures: provider-specific logic added outside webhook provider boundary

precedent.trigger: task mentions webhook handler, webhook payload, or provider event
precedent.lesson: Webhook provider changes must use the provider boundary and nullable payload helpers.
evidence: review-comment: provider-specific logic leaked into shared handler
validation: pnpm test:webhooks is the narrow command
precedent.injection: For webhook changes in this repo: run pnpm test:webhooks, keep provider-specific logic inside the webhook provider boundary, and reuse existing nullable payload helpers.
